message:
test(fcp-host): expand 3 more under-covered modules via parallel subagents

budget.rs: 81 → 129 (+48 tests) — boundary conditions, metric kinds,
multi-zone policies, snapshot states, async engine edge cases.

progress.rs: 70 → 134 (+64 tests) — ProgressUnit variants, percentage
boundaries, ProgressController multi-op tracking, aggregate edge cases.

error.rs: 107 → 166 (+59 tests) — Send/Sync bounds, downcast, Display
formatting, HostResult combinators, cross-thread, chained operations.

fcp-host total: 2404 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
